title: Quick check: adding and subtracting complex numbers

questions.text: If $z = 5 - 2i$ and $w = 3 + 7i$, what is the real part of $z + w$?
questions.explanation: Add the real parts and the imaginary parts separately: $z + w = (5+3) + (-2+7)i = 8 + 5i$, so the real part is $8$.

questions.text: Using the same $z = 5 - 2i$ and $w = 3 + 7i$, what is the imaginary part of $z + w$ (the coefficient of $i$)?
questions.explanation: $z + w = (5+3) + (-2+7)i = 8 + 5i$, so the imaginary part is $5$.

questions.text: If $z = 2 + 3i$ and $w = 5 - i$, what is $z - w$?
questions.explanation: Subtract real from real and imaginary from imaginary: $z - w = (2-5) + (3-(-1))i = -3 + 4i$.
